ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "product" TEXT /* Product of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the gene is located */,
  "start" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand of the gene (positive or negative) */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the gene */,
  "source_database" TEXT /* Source database of the gene data */,
  "reference_id" TEXT /* External reference ID for cross-referencing */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the gene data was last updated */,
  "organism" TEXT /* Organism to which the gene belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genes_chromosome FOREIGN KEY ("chromosome") REFERENCES chromosomes ("chromosome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chromosomes" (
  "chromosome_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each chromosome */,
  "chromosome_name" TEXT /* Name of the chromosome */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the chromosome */,
  "organism" TEXT /* Organism to which the chromosome belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chromosome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_batches" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batch */,
  "batch_name" TEXT /* Name of the batch */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* ID of the gene */,
  "expression_level" INTEGER /* Expression level of the gene in the batch */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date when the batch experiment was conducted */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the batch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id", "gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chemostats" (
  "chemostat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chemostat experiment */,
  "chemostat_name" TEXT /* Name of the chemostat experiment */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* ID of the gene */,
  "expression_level" INTEGER /* Expression level of the gene in the chemostat experiment */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date when the chemostat experiment was conducted */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the chemostat experiment was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chemostat_id", "gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the product */,
  "gene_count" INTEGER /* Number of genes associated with the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_functions" (
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each function */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Name of the function */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the function */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the function */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* ID of the gene */,
  "annotation" TEXT /* Annotation of the gene */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the annotation */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_annotations_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* ID of the gene being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the gene */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the gene was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* ID of the gene */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the gene */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Summary of changes in this version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who approved the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_versions_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
